description: This video explains the history of blockchain technology, starting from its early concepts in 1991 to the development of Bitcoin and Ethereum. It covers key figures like Satoshi Nakamoto and Vitalik Buterin, and discusses the evolution of decentralized applications and smart contracts.
topic_summary: The video outlines the development of blockchain technology from its inception in 1991 through the creation of Bitcoin in 2009 and the launch of Ethereum in 2015. It highlights the contributions of notable figures and the significance of smart contracts in the blockchain ecosystem. [t=0:24] [t=229:00]
